User Service Agreement

Updated: December 30, 2021



Welcome to the services provided by Leguo!

This User License Service Agreement ("this Agreement" or "User Agreement") is entered into between you and the Leguo game service provider and has contractual effect. To protect your lawful rights, please read carefully and fully understand all clauses before agreeing to and accepting them, especially the clauses that exempt or limit liability, and any separate agreements for activating or using a particular service. Limitation and disclaimer clauses may be highlighted in bold to draw your attention.

By clicking to log in to the game online, you are deemed to have read and understood the entire content of this Agreement and agreed to comply with it. Unless you have read and accepted all clauses of this Agreement, you have no right to use the Leguo game services. Your use of the Leguo game services is deemed to mean you have read and agreed to this Agreement.

If you are under 18 years of age, please read this Agreement together with your legal guardian, and pay special attention to the clauses concerning minors.

The developer and the user agree to, understand, and abide by the following clauses, which apply not only to Leguo game services but also to any similar or related services the developer may offer, and are binding in both cases.



Chapter 1     Definitions

Unless otherwise specified, the following terms have the following meanings in this Agreement:

1.1    This Agreement: refers to the text of this Agreement, the game rules, and their amended versions. Once officially published, the foregoing content becomes an inseparable part of this Agreement. If you need to use other services provided by Leguo, you must also comply with the service agreement terms related to those services, which likewise form an inseparable part of this Agreement.

1.2    Game Rules: refers to the user rules, player regulations, game announcements and notices concerning Leguo games, published and revised from time to time by the Leguo game service provider.

1.3    Leguo Game Service Provider: refers to Hainan Leguo Interactive Entertainment Technology Co., Ltd. and its affiliated companies, which provide you with Leguo games and services, referred to as "Leguo" in this Agreement.

1.4    Leguo Games: refers collectively to the games operated by Leguo, including computer client games, web games, mobile games, and other forms of games; Leguo games may be provided in software form, in which case Leguo games also include the related software and documentation.

1.5    Leguo Game Services: refers to the various game-related online operating services provided to you by Leguo.

1.6    Leguo Game Components: refers to the text, images, audio, video, icons, interface design, layout, related data or electronic documents, and other content and information contained in or related to Leguo games.

1.7    You: also referred to as "Player" or "User", refers to the natural person authorized to use Leguo's products and services.

1.8    Game Data: refers to the various data recorded by the server generated during your use of Leguo games, including but not limited to game logs, security logs, and other data.

1.9    Illegal Top-up: refers to any top-up made through any payment channel other than those officially integrated into the Leguo game.

1.10  Virtual Items: including but not limited to virtual currency, props, equipment, materials, etc. within Leguo games.

1.11  User Information: refers to the information you register in the real-name registration system, the game data under your game account, and other information and data you provide to Leguo during your use of the Leguo game services, or that Leguo needs to collect based on considerations such as security and user experience optimization.

Any infringement of a third party's intellectual property rights arising solely from your violation of this Agreement or other reasons attributable to you shall be your sole responsibility, and you shall compensate Leguo for any losses it suffers as a result.

The scope of use of the above rights includes but is not limited to use on the current or other websites, applications, products, or terminal devices.

Chapter 3     Acquisition, Use, and Safekeeping of the Game Account

3.1    Acquisition of the Game Account

(1)     If you need to use and enjoy Leguo games and Leguo game services, you must fully agree to the terms of this Agreement, comply with its requirements, and complete the registration process as required by the registration page, including but not limited to entering correct basic information. Users undertake to register under their true identity, including but not limited to completing real-name verification as required by Leguo games and agreeing to have the submitted information verified by a third-party institution, and warrant that the information provided is true, complete, and valid. Users bear the corresponding legal responsibility for the information provided in accordance with laws and this Agreement.

(2)     Upon successful registration, you will receive a corresponding account, which you may use to log in to the game and/or use related services.

(3)     If you refuse to provide the required information, or the information provided does not meet requirements, Leguo has the right to refuse to provide the relevant services or assume any obligation. If any information you provided changes, you should update it promptly; Leguo will provide the relevant service accordingly. If account information changes without timely updates such that your valid identity cannot be verified, Leguo has the right to refuse to provide any information or assume any obligation.

(4)     You only have the right to use the game account you create; ownership of the game account belongs to Leguo.

(5)     You fully understand and agree that Leguo has the right to review whether the identity information you provided upon registration is true and valid, and to take reasonable technical and management measures to safeguard the security and validity of your game account. Leguo will use your real-name registration information for anti-addiction purposes in accordance with national requirements, i.e., Leguo may determine whether you are 18 years of age or older based on your real-name registration information, and decide accordingly whether to apply anti-addiction restrictions to your game account.

3.2    Use and Safekeeping of the User Account

(1)     You are obligated to properly safeguard your game account and associated password, and to use them correctly and securely. The game account you register under this Agreement is for your personal entertainment or consumption purposes only. You are legally entitled to the rights and bear the responsibility for actions taken under your logged-in account, and must not share your account with third parties or transfer, gift, or lend it to others, or have others play on your behalf. If your failure to properly safeguard, or correctly and securely use, your account and password results in loss of the account/password or account theft and causes damage to your or others' civil rights, you shall bear the legal responsibility arising therefrom.

(2)     You should notify Leguo immediately upon becoming aware that your account or password has been used illegally by others, stolen, or is behaving abnormally, and have the right to request Leguo to suspend the login and use of that game account.

(3)     If Leguo suspends the login and use of a user account based on your notice, Leguo has the right to require you to provide and verify personal identity information consistent with the registered identity information. If Leguo verifies that the information you provided is consistent with the registered identity information, it shall promptly suspend the login and use of the user account; if Leguo fails to promptly suspend the account after verification and this causes loss to the user, Leguo shall bear the corresponding legal responsibility. If you fail to provide valid personal identification, or the identification you provide is inconsistent with the registered identity information, Leguo has the right to refuse your request to suspend the login and use of the game account.

(4)     You fully understand and agree that, in order to improve the security level of the Leguo game services, Leguo has the right to apply relevant technology or software to Leguo games, but Leguo does not guarantee that these security measures can completely eliminate the risk of the game account being stolen or lost.

(5)     You fully understand and agree that if Leguo restricts, freezes, or terminates the use of your game account in accordance with relevant business rules, this may result in the deletion of the game data and related information under your game account, and the loss of related rights and interests; you shall bear such loss yourself, and Leguo shall bear no responsibility.

(6)     You fully understand and agree to accept Leguo sending you, via SMS or other means, promotional information about products, game services, or other related commercial information from Leguo or its partners. If you wish to stop receiving push messages from Leguo, you may contact Leguo through the contact information published on Leguo's official website to request cancellation, and the push messages will be cancelled after the developer verifies the request.

(7)     You fully understand and agree that, in order to efficiently utilize server resources, if you have not used your game account to log in to Leguo games for a long period, Leguo has the right, as needed and with advance notice, to delete the game account and its associated game data and related information; such action may result in the loss of related rights and interests under that game account, for which Leguo shall bear no responsibility.

(8)     If, in order to protect your lawful rights, you provide Leguo with personal identification information consistent with your registered identity information, Leguo agrees, in accordance with the requirements of administrative and judicial authorities, to provide necessary assistance and support such as proof of account registration and original registration information, and to provide relevant evidentiary materials to such authorities as needed.



Chapter 4     Collection, Use, and Protection of User Information

4.1   You agree to and authorize Leguo to collect and use your user information for the purposes of performing this Agreement. Leguo's collection, use, sharing, storage, and management of the personal information contained within your user information will comply with Leguo's unified Privacy Policy and relevant laws and regulations.

4.2   You fully understand and agree that if you disclose to others any of your various property accounts, bank cards, credit cards, and their corresponding passwords or other important materials and information while using the Leguo game services, any resulting loss shall be borne by you.

Chapter 5     Leguo Games and Leguo Game Services

5.1   You may use Leguo games and Leguo game services for non-commercial purposes only, in the following ways:

(1)     Receiving, downloading, installing, launching, upgrading, logging in to, displaying, running, and/or taking screenshots of Leguo games;

(2)     Creating a game character, setting a nickname, viewing game rules, your personal profile, and match results, setting game parameters, using chat functions and social sharing functions, and purchasing, using, or gifting virtual items through legitimate means within the game.

Any other unauthorized installation, use, access, display, operation, or transfer that you carry out will be deemed a violation of this Agreement.

5.8   You fully understand and agree that, in order to create a fair and healthy gaming environment, Leguo has the right to understand information about your relevant terminal device through technical means while you use the Leguo game services. Upon discovering any unauthorized program that endangers the normal operation of the Leguo game services, Leguo will collect all related information and take reasonable measures to combat it.

5.9   You fully understand and agree that when you use the paid functions of Leguo games, you shall pay the corresponding fees as required by Leguo. This right belongs to Leguo's autonomous business discretion; Leguo reserves the right to change its business model at any time, including the fee rate standards, the software functions that are charged for, the object of the charge, and the timing of the charge. Leguo also reserves the right to upgrade, revise, add to, delete from, modify, or otherwise change the functions of this application, or change the game rules. If you do not accept such changes, you should stop using the application immediately; your continued use of the application will be deemed acceptance of the changed business model.

 When making a top-up, you must carefully confirm your account and information; Leguo is not responsible for any harm to your own interests caused by factors such as entering the wrong account, improper operation, or not fully understanding the top-up billing method, resulting in a top-up to the wrong account or the wrong type of top-up being selected.

5.10 You fully understand and agree that, in order to ensure the game speed for you and other users, Leguo has the right to periodically transfer or clear certain historical game data stored on the Leguo game servers.

5.11 You fully understand and agree that the game services you use involve internet services, and may be affected by instability at any point across the internet. Therefore, the game services carry the risk of interruption or failure to meet user requirements due to force majeure, viruses or hacker attacks, system instability, the user's location, the user powering off their device, and other technical, network, or communication-line reasons.

 In view of this, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Leguo does not guarantee that the game services provided will necessarily meet your requirements, nor does it guarantee that the game services provided will not be interrupted, and makes no warranty regarding the timeliness, security, occurrence of errors, or the accuracy, timeliness, or smooth transmission of information in the game services.

5.12 You fully understand and agree that, while using the Leguo game services, there is a risk of encountering anonymous or impersonated information from any other person, including threatening, defamatory, offensive, or illegal content or conduct, or infringement of the rights of others (including intellectual property rights); you bear this risk. 5.13 You fully understand and note the following:

(1)     Leguo may from time to time update the application by releasing software upgrade packages or patches, online updates, etc. During the update process, Leguo may retrieve and collect information such as your personal game client software version, and automatically replace, modify, delete, and/or supplement it. This is a necessary operation or step of a software update; if you do not agree to Leguo performing such an operation, please do not update; your act of using the application shall be deemed as your agreement to Leguo performing such an operation.

(2)     For the game, some updates may be software version updates; if you do not perform such an update, you will be unable to log in to the application. Furthermore, such an update will cause the software version originally used on your terminal to be completely replaced by the new software version.

(3)     Obtaining virtual items such as game currency, game props, or game equipment from a third party may carry various risks. You must not obtain the aforementioned game virtual items from a third party; if you insist on doing so, you shall bear the corresponding risk yourself, and Leguo has the right to directly reclaim or delete such game virtual items.

(4)     Measures taken by Leguo due to a user's conduct in violation of this Agreement or regulations may cause virtual items with a usage period under your current game account to become unusable because their usage period expires while Leguo's measures are in effect; any resulting loss shall be borne by you. That is, the duration during which Leguo's measures are in effect is counted within the usage period of virtual items with a usage period; after such measures are lifted, the usage period of the virtual items will not be extended as a result.

5.14 Leguo may, through the application's official website, customer service hotline, game administrators, or other channels, provide you with customer services such as explanations of game rules, complaints about bugs (also known as loopholes or defects) or cheats, recovery of game items, locking or unlocking of game items, and account appeals. The provision of the above services is based on the following preconditions:

(1)     Learn about the content, requirements, and fees of these customer services through Leguo's official customer service website or other channels provided by Leguo, carefully decide whether you need the corresponding customer service, and accurately and truthfully express your needs to Leguo.

(2)     Agree to and accept Leguo's specific agreement or terms regarding such customer service.

(3)     Truthfully provide your relevant personal information and game situation as required by Leguo, as well as information you have about other users or the online game itself, such as your account and the personal information under it, the login status and game item status of the online game, bugs (also known as loopholes or defects) existing within the application, cheats, and information you know about other players using bugs or cheats.

5.15 When any of the following circumstances occurs, Leguo has the right to stop or interrupt the services provided by the game servers, and Leguo shall bear no responsibility to users or third parties for any inconvenience or damage arising therefrom:

(1)     Periodic inspection or construction, hardware/software updates, etc.; Leguo has the right to suspend the service but will complete maintenance and update work as soon as possible;

(2)     The server is damaged and cannot operate normally;

(3)     Sudden hardware/software equipment or electronic communication equipment failure;

(4)     Failure of the network provider's lines or other faults;

(5)     Emergency measures to safeguard national security or the personal safety of other users or third parties;

(6)     Force majeure and other third-party reasons.

5.16 Leguo will, in accordance with relevant laws, regulations, and this Agreement, take effective measures to protect the lawful rights and interests of minors during their use of the Leguo game services, including possibly adopting technical measures, prohibiting minors from accessing unsuitable games or game functions, restricting minors' game time and spending, and preventing minors from becoming addicted to the internet. As part of the game rules, Leguo will also publish user guidance and warnings for Leguo games in appropriate places, including introductions to game content, methods for correct use of the game, and methods for preventing harm. All minor users should carefully read and follow these guidelines and instructions under the guidance of their legal guardian; other players should avoid publishing or generating any content harmful to the physical and mental health of minors while using the Leguo game services, and jointly create a healthy gaming environment.

Leguo does not encourage minors to engage in any spending using Leguo's products/services; if any spending occurs, minors should apply for such spending in the name of their legal guardian or operate with the express consent of their legal guardian. A minor's use of Leguo shall be deemed to have obtained the consent of their legal guardian. The legal guardians of minors should properly safeguard payment devices, payment accounts, and payment passwords, etc., to prevent the ward from using functions such as top-ups without consent.

Chapter 7     Software Download and Installation

7.1   Using the Leguo game services may require downloading and installing related software; you may obtain the software directly from Leguo's relevant website, or from a third party authorized by Leguo. If you obtain a Leguo game, or a game with the same name as a Leguo game, from a third party not authorized by Leguo, this will be deemed as you not having obtained Leguo's authorization; Leguo cannot guarantee that such a game will function normally, and bears no responsibility for any loss caused to you as a result.

7.2   Leguo may have developed different software versions for different terminal devices or operating systems, including but not limited to Windows, iOS, Android, Windows Phone, Symbian, BlackBerry, and other application versions; you should select and download the appropriate version to install based on your actual circumstances, and after downloading the installer, you should follow the steps prompted by the installer to install it correctly.

7.3   In order to provide a better gaming and more secure service, Leguo may recommend that you install other software during software installation; you may choose to install it or not.

7.4   If you no longer need to use the software, or need to install a new version, you may uninstall it yourself.

7.5   In order to ensure the security and functional consistency of the Leguo game services, Leguo has the right to update the software, or change or restrict some of the software's functions, without specifically notifying you in advance.

7.6   After a new version of the software is released, the old version may become unusable; Leguo does not guarantee that the old version of the software and the corresponding customer service will continue to be available; please check for and download the latest version at any time.

8.5   Leguo does not authorize you to obtain a game account, game props, game equipment, game currency, etc. from any third party through purchase, gift, or other means; Leguo is not responsible for third-party transaction conduct, and will not accept appeals arising from disputes over any third-party transaction.

8.7   You fully understand that there is an objective lack of interoperability between different operating systems, which Leguo did not cause, and which may result in your top-up and game data on one operating system being unable to smoothly transfer to another operating system. Any loss of top-ups or game data resulting from your switching between different systems shall be borne by you, and you may not require Leguo to bear any responsibility.

If you have any objection or question about the content of this Policy, you may contact us through the "Contact Us" section (Section 10) of this Policy.



[Special Notice]

3. 6. 1.   Information We Collect

During your use of this game and its services, in accordance with the principles of legality, legitimacy, and necessity, we will collect the following information you actively provide while using the services, or information generated as a result of using the services, in order to ensure the normal operation and functioning of the product, improve the product and services, and safeguard user security.

(1)   Registration, Login, Authentication

1.   If you log in and use this game via a third-party account, you authorize us to obtain your public information registered on the third-party platform (avatar, nickname, and other information you authorize), in order to bind it with this game and save your login information, so that you can log in to and use this game and related services.

2.   Depending on the specific circumstances of use, you may need to provide your true identity information (real name, ID number, phone number) to complete real-name verification. This information is sensitive personal information; you may decline to provide it, but you may then be unable to obtain the relevant services, though this will not affect your normal use of other functions and services.

3.   If you log in and use this game via a third-party account, you authorize us to use your friend relationships, information related to your operations in the game, game information, and other information (specifically including but not limited to your login status, match information/status, achievement information, etc.), as well as other information you authorize, for display to you or other users or friends. We may provide you with relevant permission settings depending on the specific game product, so that you can make corresponding settings regarding whether the aforementioned information is displayed.

(2)   Normal and Secure Operation of the Program

1.   In order to ensure the security and normal operation of the software and services, we collect information such as your hardware model, operating system version, International Mobile Equipment Identity (IMEI), unique device identifier, network device hardware address, IP address, WLAN access point, MAC address, application ID, Bluetooth, base station, software version, network access method and type, status, network quality data, and operation/usage/service logs. If you use a phone from a brand such as Xiaomi, Meizu, or Huawei, the Push SDK from that phone manufacturer integrated into the game will need to collect the phone's unique identification information (such as IMEI), and may also collect parameters such as your device's screen size.

2.   In order to enable you to view your game history on the client, and to determine account security, perform identity verification, detect and prevent security incidents, conduct game operation statistical analysis, handle customer service complaints and other game security analysis, and to enhance your gaming experience, we collect your account information, device information, service log information, as well as information that our affiliates and partners share with us after obtaining your authorization or that they may lawfully share, and information about your use of the application and services, such as login logs, item logs, game session information, friend records, connection and service-related data information generated by the application and services, network tests, service quality, date, time, and geographic location, etc.

3.   In order to prevent malicious programs and ensure secure, stable operation, we may collect information about installed applications or running processes, the overall operation, usage frequency, crash conditions, overall installation and usage conditions, performance data, and source of the application.

4.   When the game product you are using has a payment function, we collect your top-up records, spending records, and other information, so that you can query your transaction records and we can protect the security of your virtual items.

5.   We may collect and retain your interactions with other players via text, images, voice, video, and other means within the game, in order to filter inappropriate content such as pornography, violence, and malicious advertising.

6.   Depending on the game and service content, after you authorize and consent, the game will access your microphone and camera to provide you with functions such as voice chat and livestream interaction.

7.   When you use location-related services, we may record location information about where your device is located, in order to provide you with interaction with nearby game players. Geographic location information is sensitive information; declining to provide this information will only result in your being unable to interact with nearby game players, but will not affect your normal use of the game's other functions, and you may withdraw your authorization for geographic location information at any time.

(3)   Permissions Requested, Their Purpose, and the Personal Information Involved

In order to better provide you with services and ensure the normal and secure operation of the program, we will request the following permissions from you. The methods of requesting the following permissions include but are not limited to: pop-up prompts, interface prompts, etc.

The method of obtaining the same permission may vary across different terminal devices; the actual method used will be based on the terminal device you actually use.

Due to device differences, obtaining some permissions may appear in different ways on different devices; for example, reading the IMEI number may appear in the form of "Allow XX software to make and manage phone calls?"; information storage may appear in the form of "Allow XX software to access your device's photos, media content, and files?" However, we guarantee that obtaining only the user's IMEI, information storage, location, and other permissions will not collect your private information, and is used solely to ensure the normal operation and functioning of the product, improve the product and services, and safeguard user security.

Some of the permissions requested from you are obtained by our partner vendors' SDKs; please refer to Section 4 for information about partner vendor SDKs.

(2)   Advertising Display

Subject to compliance with relevant laws and regulations, we may cooperate with third-party advertising partners to display advertisements. Our partners include but are not limited to Tencent, etc. Our partners may collect hardware and software information, such as IP address, device ID and type, advertising ID, device language, operating system, time zone, and identifiers associated with cookies or other technologies that may uniquely identify your device. The aforementioned partners' collection and processing of information is governed by their own privacy terms and is not subject to this Policy. To protect your lawful rights, if you discover a risk, we recommend that you immediately stop the relevant operation and contact us promptly.

(3)   Cookies and Similar Technologies

To improve your user experience, we use cookies or similar technologies (such as web beacons, log files, scripts, eTags) (collectively referred to as "Cookies" technology below). Cookies technology will generate small files on your device so that we can provide specific functions. If you choose to disable Cookies technology, you may be unable to experience some functions of our game services.

5.   Storage of Information

(1) In accordance with laws and regulations, we store the personal information we collect and generate during domestic operations within the territory of the People's Republic of China. If we transfer information overseas, we will comply with relevant national regulations or seek your consent.

(2) We store your information through secure means, including local storage (such as using the app for data caching), databases, and server logs.

(3) We will continue to retain your personal information for as long as you use the company's services. If you cancel your account or if the company's products cease operating, we will retain network logs for [1] year from the date of cancellation or cessation of operations. For the retention period of other data, we undertake to retain it only for the minimum period necessary to provide the service; after such period expires, we will delete or anonymize your relevant information.

6.   Protection of Information

(1) We strive to provide security for users' information to prevent leakage, loss, misuse, unauthorized access, and disclosure of information. We use multi-faceted security protection measures to ensure that the protection of users' personal information remains at a reasonable security level, including identity authentication, data encryption, access control, protection against malicious code, security audits, technical protection measures, management system controls, security system safeguards, and many other aspects.

(2) Although we take the above reasonable and effective measures and comply with the standards required by relevant laws and regulations, please understand that due to technical limitations, various possible malicious methods, and issues with systems and communication networks beyond our control, we find it difficult to always guarantee 100% security of information; however, we will do our best to ensure the security of the personal information you provide to us. We also recommend that you pay full attention to protecting your personal information while using our products and services, and that you take proactive measures to protect the security of your personal information, including but not limited to using complex passwords, changing your password periodically, and not disclosing your account password and related personal information to others.

(3) If a personal information leak or other security incident occurs, we will activate our contingency plan to prevent the security incident from expanding. After a security incident occurs, we will inform you, via announcement, push notification, email, or similar means, of the basic circumstances of the security incident, the remedial measures we are about to take or have already taken, and our recommendations for you to respond. If it is difficult to notify you individually, we will issue a warning through announcements or similar means.

(4) Once you leave this game and its related services and browse or use other websites, services, or content resources, regardless of whether your login, browsing, or use of the aforementioned software or website is based on a link or guidance from this game, we will have neither the ability nor the obligation to protect any personal information you submit to such software or website.

7.   Your Rights

During your use of this game and its services, we may provide you with corresponding operational settings, depending on the specific game product, so that you can query, delete, correct, or withdraw your relevant personal information, game registration information, cancel your account, and withdraw authorizations you have already granted; you may refer to this game's specific guidance to carry out such operations. In addition, we have established complaint, request, and reporting channels, and your comments will be handled promptly.

The specific methods of operation are as follows:

1. Query/deletion function: Obtain the contact email in [Contact Us], and send us an email to make a query or request deletion; to clear the data within the APP, users can find this product in the device's Settings -> Apps -> Installed list, and clear the data there;

2. Changing the scope of authorization: Change the scope of authorization through the phone system's permission settings; if you need any assistance, you may contact us via email at any time for help;

3. Complaints and reports: Obtain the contact email in [Contact Us], and send us an email to complain about or report the relevant conduct;

4. Account cancellation: Obtain the contact email in [Contact Us], and send us an email to apply for account cancellation; we will respond to you as soon as possible.

8.   Provisions on Minors

(1) If you are a minor under the age of 18, before using this game and related services, you should read and agree to this Policy together with your parents or other guardian, under their supervision and guidance.

(2) We protect the personal information of minors in accordance with relevant national laws and regulations, and will only collect, use, store, share, transfer, or disclose the personal information of minors where permitted by law, with the explicit consent of a parent or other guardian, or where necessary to protect the minor; if we discover that we have collected the personal information of a minor without first obtaining verifiable parental consent, we will seek to delete the relevant information as soon as possible.

(3) If you are the legal guardian of a minor, please pay attention to whether the minor under your guardianship is using this game's services or providing their personal information with your authorization and consent. If you have any questions about the personal information of the minor under your guardianship, please contact us using the contact information in this Policy.

(4) With respect to the personal information of children under the age of 14 that may be involved, in addition to complying with this Policy's provisions on user personal information, we will also strictly follow the requirements of laws and regulations such as the Provisions on the Cyber Protection of Children's Personal Information regarding storage, use, and disclosure.

9.   Policy Changes

(1) We may revise, supplement, or change this Policy from time to time; such revisions, supplements, or changes will form part of this Policy and have the same effect as this Policy. Without your explicit consent, we will not reduce the rights you are entitled to under the currently effective version of this Policy.

(2) Before this Policy is updated, we will notify you through prominent notices on the game page or by sending you an email or other appropriate means, so that you can learn about the latest version of this Policy in a timely manner. After obtaining your explicit consent again, we will collect, process, or use your personal information in accordance with the updated Privacy Policy.



10. How to Contact Us

We have a dedicated department for personal information protection and have designated a person specifically responsible for the protection of children's personal information, and will strictly protect children's personal information in accordance with these rules. If guardians or children have complaints or reports regarding network information security, or have any questions, comments, or suggestions regarding these rules, the rules and measures for protecting children's personal information, you may contact us by email.

Contact email: xiaobei-kf@foxmail.com

Contact address: Room 601 (Unit No.: Self-numbered 601-A), No. 30 Zhujiang East Road, Tianhe District, Guangzhou

In general, we will respond within fifteen working days of receiving your question, comment, or suggestion and verifying the identity of the guardian and/or child.
